name: african-guard
description: African Guard fraud intelligence and prevention operating system.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @african-guard/api && npm run build -w @african-guard/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @african-guard/web && npm run lint -w @african-guard/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @african-guard/web && npm run typecheck -w @african-guard/api
scripts.security:scan: npm run security:secrets && npm run security:bundle
